prompt: Smart home control interface with neumorphic design elements, soft shadows and raised buttons, room layouts in isometric view, warm LED indicators, and tactile switch animations
prompt_refined: A clean, modern smart home control interface screen, prominently featuring neumorphic design elements. The interface includes sculpted, raised buttons and interactive UI components casting soft, diffused shadows for a sense of depth. Within the display, miniature room layouts are rendered in an isometric view. Toggle switches and controls are accented with warm, amber LED indicators signifying active states, conveying a highly tactile and responsive user experience.
